summary: Test suite provides reasonable unit test coverage of core PowerShell functions (glob conversion, label matching, error handling) with good Pester organization and fixtures. However, it catastrophically misses the explicit requirement that 'ALL TESTS MUST RUN THROUGH ACT' and produce 'act-result.txt' as a required artifact. Missing: (1) integration test harness running workflow via `act push --rm`, (2) workflow YAML structure validation and actionlint checks, (3) any proof the workflow was tested, (4) tests for workflow triggers/permissions/dependencies, (5) parsing and assertion of act output against known-good results. Task is explicit: workflow testing is mandatory, not optional. The `act-result.txt` file must exist when done. This test suite never touches the CI/CD pipeline at all—only unit tests—so it fails ~50% of the stated requirements.
